gāthā
1 Verse.
2 A religious verse, but not belonging to any one of the Vedas.
3 A stanza.
4 A song.
5 A Prākṛta dialect.
6 N. of the Aryā metre.
Comp.
— kāraḥ a writer of Prākṛta verses.
